message: Significant gait velocity degradation (15.3% slowdown over 5 days) and elevated blood pressure detected for Martha Reynolds. Symptoms correlate with the recent initiation of Metoprolol Succinate and potential interaction with Lisinopril. Resident is at increased risk for falls.
actions: Immediate clinical nursing assessment of orthostatic vitals
Ensure resident transition from sit-to-stand is slow
Schedule physician review of Metoprolol/Lisinopril dosage
correlation: 15.3% gait degradation and elevated BP (142/88 mmHg) correlate with recent (May 23) initiation of Metoprolol Succinate; interaction risk between Metoprolol and Lisinopril identified.

message: Mild changes in vital signs and gait detected, prompting a companion check-in regarding potential dizziness and safety advice.
